results.evidence: SDK packages in package.json (lines 12-18), NodeSDK init in tracing.js, loaded via Dockerfile CMD --require ./tracing.js

10 spans in auth-gateway.js: auth.login(L404), auth.refresh(L589), auth.logout(L680), auth.register(L793), auth.forgot-password(L935), auth.introspect(L1065), auth.verify(L1164), auth.reset-password(L1252), auth.check-email(L1468), auth.get-student-id(L306). All set attributes and record exceptions.

metrics.js: auth.requests counter + auth.latency histogram. Middleware at auth-gateway.js:99-108 records both per /api request with endpoint, method, status attributes. MetricReader configured in tracing.js:16-19.
getNodeAutoInstrumentations() in tracing.js:20-23 includes @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http which auto-injects/extracts W3C traceparent on all Node http calls (Express incoming + axios outgoing).
OTLPTraceExporter in tracing.js:15, OTLPMetricExporter in tracing.js:17. OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT documented in .env.example:45. Standard OTEL env vars supported by SDK.

findings.title: Dockerfile missing COPY for metrics.js
findings.issue: metrics.js was not copied into Docker image. Container would crash on startup with MODULE_NOT_FOUND.
